intro: Clothes moths are a serious threat to Kew Gardens residents, damaging valuable clothing, upholstery, and textiles in closets and storage areas. Our professional clothes moth control services protect your wardrobe and fabrics from these destructive pests throughout Kew Gardens' beautiful tree-lined streets and historic homes. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive treatment plans ranging from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of infestation and property size.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Kew Gardens families with specialized clothes moth treatments that eliminate larvae, adults, and eggs from your home. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of treating clothes moths in Queens' diverse housing stock, from pre-war apartments to single-family Tudor homes, using targeted methods that protect your valuable textiles.

faqs.question: How much does clothes moth control cost in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Kew Gardens typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and number of treatments required. A standard apartment treatment starts around $550, while larger homes or severe infestations requiring multiple visits and extensive closet treatments can reach $5,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Kew Gardens residents.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Kew Gardens home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small irregular holes in wool, silk, or fur garments, silken tubes or cases in closet corners, adult moths flying near wardrobes (especially at dusk), and webbing or cocoons on clothing or carpet edges. You may also notice larvae that look like small cream-colored worms. If you spot any of these signs in your Kew Gardens home, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: What does your clothes moth treatment process involve?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive clothes moth treatment includes a thorough inspection of closets, storage areas, and upholstered furniture, followed by targeted applications of safe, effective products to eliminate moths at all life stages. We treat cracks, crevices, and affected areas, provide guidance on cleaning infested garments, and offer prevention strategies including pheromone traps. Follow-up visits ensure complete elimination and long-term protection for your Kew Gardens home.

faqs.question: How can I prevent clothes moths from returning to my Kew Gardens home?
faqs.answer: Prevention includes regular vacuuming of closets and under furniture, dry cleaning or freezing woolens before storage, using cedar products or lavender sachets as natural deterrents, storing seasonal clothing in sealed containers, and maintaining low humidity levels. Our Kew Gardens technicians provide customized prevention plans and can install monitoring traps to catch any new moth activity before it becomes a problem.
